category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF analysis toolkit; official GitHub README describes PDF structure visualization and scanning embedded streams for malicious content with YARA.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is THE PDFALYZER; source_facts.name is pdfalyzer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains quick start, command usage, capabilities, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, which is the source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pdfalyze and related tools; official README describes PDF analysis, YARA scanning, visualization, and Python package installation.
